title: Damkutla Dumkutla Lyrics TNPL Anthem
stanzas:
Damkutla Dumkutla
udukutla adungutla
thenna matta
paricha atta
engalukku bat-tu

Damkutla Dumkutla
udukutla adungutla
sevura stump-a
mathiduvom
moonu koda pottu

naanga nara nara
enga adi thara thara
edhuku vara vara
yaaru ingae
ara kora.

Damkutla Dumkutla
udukutla adungutla
thenna matta
paricha atta
engalukku bat-tu

Damkutla Dumkutla
udukutla adungutla
sevura stump-a
mathiduvom
moonu koda pottu

moodiginnu konjam othu
semma matter thaan
namma TNPL maappu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Damkutla Dumkutla celebrates the spirit of sports and camaraderie, encouraging listeners to join in the fun and excitement.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is part of the TNPL Anthem and does not belong to a specific movie.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Anirudh and Shabareesh Varma.

Who composed the music for this anthem?

The music for Damkutla Dumkutla was composed by Anirudh.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 18, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Damkutla Dumkutla serves as the vibrant anthem for the TNPL, encapsulating the thrill and excitement of cricket. Its upbeat tempo and energetic lyrics evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it perfect for festive occasions. The collaboration between Anirudh and Shabareesh Varma brings a lively spirit that resonates with fans and players alike. This anthem encourages unity and enthusiasm, making it a staple for any celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Damkutla Dumkutla is an electrifying anthem that captures the spirit of celebration and excitement. With Anirudh's vibrant beats and Shabareesh Varma's dynamic vocals, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the infectious energy of this anthem that perfectly embodies the essence of the TNPL!
stanzaMeanings: We will not change our ways, we will stand strong and proud for our team.
We will not change our ways, we will unite and fight together with three goals in mind.
We are strong, we will give our best, who is coming here to challenge us?
When they come, they must face us, they must be ready to compete and fight.
We will not change our ways, we will stand strong and proud for our team.
We will not change our ways, we will unite and fight together with three goals in mind.
This is our place, this is our pride.
With a little effort, we will achieve great things, this is our TNPL legacy.
